data.body:
Slightly belated post for World Art Day. 💜

I drew this for someone who used to teach me when I lived in Berlin. 🇩🇪 Something that feels like a long time ago now, but I fondly remember. 🌺 A *lot* less screen time in those days - no bad thing! I defo did a lot more drawing back then.

#AnalogueArt

data.body: Ashby's Law is the most underused idea in governance. A parliament designed for 18th-century problems literally cannot regulate 21st-century complexity. The variety of the regulator has to match what it's regulating. Most governance reform ignores this entirely.

data.body:
純国産お米の素材で安心。ピープルお米のおもちゃこだわり4点セットは、0歳からの歯がためや知育に最適。何でも舐める赤ちゃんを優しく見守る、出産祝いやギフトに選ばれ続けるロングセラーの逸品。 - 心満意足
産まれたばかりの赤ちゃんが、生まれて初めて手にするおもちゃ。その選択に、どれほどの愛情と願いが込められているでしょうか。ピープルの「お米のおもちゃ」シリーズは、そんな親御さんの深い慈しみから生まれた、...
